name: dish-agent
description: AI-powered platform for medical image analysis with intelligent agents, SDK, CLI tools, and sandbox environment

scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:frontend" "npm run dev:sandbox"
scripts.install:all: npm install && cd frontend && npm install && cd ../backend && npm install && cd ../sdk && npm install && cd ../agent-cli && npm install && cd ../sandbox && npm install

author: Dish Agent Team
